children.heading: Authority to sanction significant traffickers in persons
children.label: a Authority to sanction significant traffickers in persons
A
children.text: Any foreign person that plays a significant role in a severe form of trafficking in persons, directly or indirectly in the United States.

children.label: B
children.text: Foreign persons that materially assist in, or provide financial or technological support for or to, or provide goods or services in support of, activities of a significant foreign trafficker in persons identified pursuant to subparagraph (A).

children.label: C
children.text: Foreign persons that are owned, controlled, or directed by, or acting for or on behalf of, a significant foreign trafficker identified pursuant to subparagraph (A).

children.label: D
children.text: Officials of a foreign government who participate in, facilitate, or condone severe forms of trafficking in persons for significant financial gain.

children.heading: Penalties
children.label: 2 Penalties
children.text: The penalties set forth in apply to violations of any license, order, or regulation issued under this section.section 1705 of title 50

children.heading: Report to Congress on identification and sanctioning of significant traffickers in persons
children.label: b Report to Congress on identification and sanctioning of significant traffickers in persons
A
children.text: identifying publicly the foreign persons that the President determines are appropriate for sanctions pursuant to this section and the basis for such determination; and

children.label: B
children.text: detailing publicly the sanctions imposed pursuant to this section.

children.heading: Removal of sanctions
children.label: 2 Removal of sanctions
children.text: Upon suspending or terminating any action imposed under the authority of subsection (a), the President shall report to the committees described in paragraph (1) on such suspension or termination.

children.heading: Submission of classified information
children.label: 3 Submission of classified information
children.text: Reports submitted under this subsection may include an annex with classified information regarding the basis for the determination made by the President under paragraph (1)(A).

children.heading: Law enforcement and intelligence activities not affected
children.label: c Law enforcement and intelligence activities not affected
children.text: Nothing in this section prohibits or otherwise limits the authorized law enforcement or intelligence activities of the United States, or the law enforcement activities of any State or subdivision thereof.

children.heading: Delegation of authority
children.label: 1 Delegation of authority
children.text: The President may delegate any authority granted by this section, including the authority to designate foreign persons under paragraphs (1)(B) and (1)(C) of subsection (a).

children.heading: Promulgation of rules and regulations
children.label: 2 Promulgation of rules and regulations
children.text: The head of any agency, including the Secretary of Treasury, is authorized to take such actions as may be necessary to carry out any authority delegated by the President pursuant to paragraph (1), including promulgating rules and regulations.

children.heading: Opportunity for review
children.label: 3 Opportunity for review
children.text: Such rules and regulations shall include procedures affording an opportunity for a person to be heard in an expeditious manner, either in person or through a representative, for the purpose of seeking changes to or termination of any determination, order, designation or other action associated with the exercise of the authority in subsection (a).

children.heading: Definition of foreign persons
children.label: f Definition of foreign persons
children.text: In this section, the term “foreign person” means any citizen or national of a foreign state or any entity not organized under the laws of the United States, including a foreign government official, but does not include a foreign state.

children.heading: Construction
children.label: g Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed as precluding judicial review of the exercise of the authority described in subsection (a).
